subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Hannen, spoken on 1909-02-25
subcodes.first_line: The Arabs we met today were deprived of civilization, and yet they think they are not in need of civilization or knowledge.
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Eastern values; culture, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @The Holy Spirit, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @spiritual transformation
